textByHash.70ed7c1262bbcaf9725241823d27ddac981f984c: Have you brought the stick yet?
textByHash.d2d390f912b619e57007defda23ff9d94eb22338: Come on, get round that course - I need something to chew!
textByHash.f8ad7e26641c653400cc818bf58ef6a590123253: You need to take your headgear off before you try the Deathslide, otherwise you won't be able to get a good enough grip with your teeth.
textByHash.246bbf23fabe3e7d4715847aa96ec3f742236fc4: Grrr - you don't belong in here, human!
textByHash.9849d80e477e3e50b010f1405d7a65048544bf6c: That headgear won't help you here, human! Take it off!
textByHash.175476a2689adbd198f9ae9f46f62829df16db1c: Remember - a slow wolf is a hungry wolf!!
textByHash.4b95e7a6f9936af2d97294b4c609be00523ea64d: Get on with it - you need your whiskers perking!!!!
textByHash.9713b43fcf46ab38cef64a007f7b664fdddb592c: Imagine the smell of blood in your nostrils!!!
textByHash.43a9b0be3361cc50e0a11a52ed6e49b55b8fa7f6: I never really wanted to be an agility trainer...
textByHash.aaea50ac72da4bdaaaf2b08a1f579fbf1a73e2c3: It'll be worth it when you hunt!!
textByHash.b0b863b0f4da1c38b9a61633ca116793861db985: Let's see those powerful backlegs at work!!
textByHash.e1a23af7fedb1df2921052b13d7cd184fbc420b0: You're the slowest wolf I've ever had the misfortune to witness!!
textByHash.23fe828b1333b11c17b4196028251ba985bf71a9: When you're done there's a human with your name on it!!
textByHash.089f2dbfa428ffccbe272881d95bd91645f9291f: You idiot - you've forgotten the stick!!!!
textByHash.8d3573aee0296c37f28978d9381ad99b84920ba7: Give my regards to the ground...
textByHash.4f86d527b149bb1574d6d4ce000ba85147c78c36: Don't let the spikes or the blood put you off...
textByHash.b184ff893c3649fe693508d3bac0cfee897918ee: Now for a true test of teeth...
textByHash.8f297d3c0b71ba5b424a51a4be7f9e44bc748583: You shouldn't even be here, human!
textByHash.96e87570f02075172093254eff707c7b50c30948: Let's see how strong human teeth are...
textByHash.b5acc369e9e9a4b9cafcbca1660235f3ce59a6ff: Remember - no stick, no agility bonus!
textByHash.851ba016bf3938d56b5d69282859ecbdf70c9632: Bring me the stick when you've finished the course!
textByHash.f6a1ee7471713b5e5c3a2440c610f5a029119e9b: Don't forget to give me the stick when you're done!
